title: The Subjunctive and Unreal Past
description: Master the mandative subjunctive (I suggest he be…), formal unreal conditions (were I to…, had I known…, should you need…), and fixed expressions with unreal past meaning (It's high time, I'd rather, as if).
sources: CEFR C2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (subjunctive; unreal past; inversion in conditionals)
